verse_text: So Miriam led them: 'Let us sing to the Lord, for He is greatly glorified.

links.context: Prophecy is the gift of the Holy Spirit to speak the will of God authoritatively. This gift is given to both men and women (see [[1CO.11:4]], [[1CO.11:5]]), and many holy women were prophets, including Miriam ([[EXO.15:20]], [[EXO.15:21]]), Deborah ([[JDG.4:4]]), Huldah ([[2KI.22:14]]), Isaiah's wife (Is 8:3), the Virgin Mary ([[LUK.1:46]]-55), and Anna ([[LUK.2:36]]-38).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
